happyscribe.description: Happy Scribe hosted automatic speech-to-text via signed upload and orders

auto.description: Automatic Happy Scribe STT with fixed en-US language and diarization enabled by default

limits.notes: Happy Scribe documents a signed-upload plus orders workflow for automatic transcription, but current public Product API docs do not publish fixed upload-size or audio-duration caps for automatic STT. AutoShow keeps Happy Scribe v1 split policy note-only and relies on explicit --split or retry-with-split if the provider rejects an oversized input.
